category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an AX.25 packet modem/TNC and APRS encoder/decoder; official GitHub README describes packet radio/APRS use.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository README uses Dire Wolf as the project name; source_facts.name is direwolf.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository points users to doc/README.md; official GitHub wiki is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/wb2osz/direwolf; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub repository description names AX.25, APRS, TNC, tracker, digipeater, and IGate use cases.
